# Exercise Reference — for Native-Speaker Review

Representative exercises across every module, grouped by taxonomy branch. Each row shows the prompt the learner sees and the exact Lithuanian answer the app accepts. Review for correctness / naturalness — flag anything that reads wrong.

## Numbers (/numbers)

Range 0–99. Two exercise types: `produce` (say the number in Lithuanian) and `recognize` (identify the number from its Lithuanian form).

| Exercise | Prompt | Correct answer |
|---|---|---|
| produce | How do you say 0? | nulis |
| produce | How do you say 5? | penki |
| recognize | What number is septyni? | 7 |
| produce | How do you say 13? | trylika |
| recognize | What number is devyniolika? | 19 |
| produce | How do you say 20? | dvidešimt |
| recognize | What number is penkiasdešimt? | 50 |
| produce | How do you say 21? | dvidešimt vienas |
| produce | How do you say 45? | keturiasdešimt penki |
| recognize | What number is devyniasdešimt devyni? | 99 |

## Age (/age)

Ages 2–99 with dative pronouns (Man, Tau, Jam, Jai). Numbers 1–9 and compound ones-digits 1–9 pair with collective numerals (dveji, treji, …) and the noun `metai`; 10–19 and round tens use cardinal numerals with the noun `metų`.

| Exercise | Prompt | Correct answer |
|---|---|---|
| produce | I am 2 years old. | Man dveji metai. |
| produce | You are 5 years old. | Tau penkeri metai. |
| produce | He is 9 years old. | Jam devyneri metai. |
| produce | She is 15 years old. | Jai penkiolika metų. |
| produce | I am 20 years old. | Man dvidešimt metų. |
| produce | You are 21 years old. | Tau dvidešimt vieneri metai. |
| produce | He is 22 years old. | Jam dvidešimt dveji metai. |
| produce | She is 45 years old. | Jai keturiasdešimt penkeri metai. |
| recognize | Man dešimt metų. | 10 |
| recognize | Tau trisdešimt treji metai. | 33 |

## Weather (/weather)

Temperatures from –20 °C to +99 °C. `produce` prompts say 'How do you say … °C?'; `recognize` prompts show a Lithuanian phrase and ask for the numeric answer. Negative is prefixed with 'minus'; the degree word inflects (laipsnis / laipsniai / laipsnių).

| Exercise | Prompt | Correct answer |
|---|---|---|
| produce | How do you say 0°C? | nulis laipsnių |
| produce | How do you say 5°C? | penki laipsniai |
| produce | How do you say 15°C? | penkiolika laipsnių |
| produce | How do you say 25°C? | dvidešimt penki laipsniai |
| produce | How do you say -1°C? | minus vienas laipsnis |
| produce | How do you say -10°C? | minus dešimt laipsnių |
| produce | How do you say -15°C? | minus penkiolika laipsnių |
| recognize | septyni laipsniai | 7 |
| recognize | minus dvylika laipsnių | -12 |

## Prices (/prices)

Two cases: `kokia` (nominative — stating the price directly) and `kiek` (accusative — saying what something costs, where the number word declines).

| Exercise | Prompt | Correct answer |
|---|---|---|
| kokia | Kokia kaina? (€1) | vienas euras. |
| kokia | Kokia kaina? (€5) | penki eurai. |
| kokia | Kokia kaina? (€15) | penkiolika eurų. |
| kokia | Kokia kaina? (€21) | dvidešimt vienas euras. |
| kokia | Kokia kaina? (€45) | keturiasdešimt penki eurai. |
| kokia | Kokia kaina? (€99) | devyniasdešimt devyni eurai. |
| kiek | Kiek kainuoja knyga? (€1) | vieną eurą. |
| kiek | Kiek kainuoja knyga? (€5) | penkis eurus. |
| kiek | Kiek kainuoja knyga? (€15) | penkiolika eurų. |
| kiek | Kiek kainuoja knyga? (€21) | dvidešimt vieną eurą. |
| kiek | Kiek kainuoja knyga? (€45) | keturiasdešimt penkis eurus. |

## Time (/time)

Representative samples below; the full 48-expression enumeration (every hour × every time type) is in `docs/reviews/time-reference.md`.

| Exercise | Prompt | Correct answer |
|---|---|---|
| whole_hour | Kiek valandų? (1:00) | Pirma valanda. |
| whole_hour | Kiek valandų? (6:00) | Šešta valanda. |
| whole_hour | Kiek valandų? (12:00) | Dvylikta valanda. |
| half_past | Kiek valandų? (1:30) | Pusė antros. |
| half_past | Kiek valandų? (6:30) | Pusė septintos. |
| half_past | Kiek valandų? (12:30) | Pusė pirmos. |
| quarter_past | Kiek valandų? (1:15) | Ketvirtis antros. |
| quarter_past | Kiek valandų? (6:15) | Ketvirtis septintos. |
| quarter_past | Kiek valandų? (12:15) | Ketvirtis pirmos. |
| quarter_to | Kiek valandų? (1:45) | Be ketvirčio antra. |
| quarter_to | Kiek valandų? (6:45) | Be ketvirčio septinta. |
| quarter_to | Kiek valandų? (12:45) | Be ketvirčio pirma. |
